name: F.A. City Grand Prix
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｆ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フォーミュラアスリート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>シティ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＧＰ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グランプリ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Increase the Levels of all "F.A." monsters on the field by 2 during the Main Phase and Battle Phase. Your opponent cannot target "F.A." monsters you control with card effects. If this face-up card on the field is destroyed by a card effect: You can add 1 "F.A." card from your Deck to your hand, except "F.A. City Grand Prix". You can only use this effect of "F.A. City Grand Prix" once per turn.
eff: Increase the Levels of all "F.A." monsters on the field by 2 during the Main Phase and Battle Phase. Your opponent cannot target "F.A." monsters you control with card effects. If this face-up card on the field is destroyed by a card effect: You can add 1 "F.A." card from your Deck to your hand, except "F.A. City Grand Prix". You can only use this effect of "F.A. City Grand Prix" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
